settings.quote: Scents by Sara was built on the stories of real women. We invite you to be part of the narrative.

settings.heading: SUBMIT YOUR STORY
settings.description: Tell us about your moment. We may feature your story as part of our community pages or in upcoming editorials.
settings.disclaimer: By submitting, you agree that Scents by Sara may publish your story, edited for brevity, across our digital channels.

settings.heading: YOUR STORIES
settings.description: Every candle tells a story. These are yours: shared moments of transformation, memory, and quiet power.
